stories.title: Air cargo shippers scramble to mitigate Iran war impacts
stories.summary: Air transport scarcity due to the Iran war is driving up shipping rates and other emergency fees for shippers, who are working to divert urgent freight around the conflict zone. The post Air cargo shippers scramble to mitigate Iran war impacts appeared first on FreightWaves.

stories.title: CBP says it can’t comply with court order for tariff refunds yet
stories.summary: The agency is confident it can implement a process that streamlines returns for now-defunct Trump administration levies in 45 days, according to a court filing.
